Telex.title: A ráktúlélő norvég bringás vette át a sárga trikót a Tour de France-on
Telex.summary: Torstein Træen benne volt a nap szökésében, miközben Pogačar lazított a negyedik szakaszon, amelyet Mads Pedersen nyert meg.

Telex.summary: A szociális szabályok frissítésénél a Fidesz, a Mi Hazánk és a Tisza is tartózkodott az EP-ben. Utóbbi szerint a szöveg több ponton kedvező, de nem ad minden kérdésre megnyugtató választ.

444.summary: A NOB közleménye cinikusan hozzáteszi persze, hogy a „továbbra is szolidaritást vállal Ukrajna olimpiai közösségével”.

444.summary: Két spanyol kapusnak is jobb szezonja volt, mint Simonnak, de a szövetségi kapitányok benne bíznak. És ő hibátlanul működik együtt a védelemmel.

444.summary: Le Pen ítéletét enyhítették, ezért elvben elindulhat, ám korábban többször kijelentette, hogy nem kíván nyomkövetővel a lábán elnökválasztási kampányt folytatni. Márpedig az ítélet erre kötelezné.

HVG.title: Feketelisták, gátlástalanság, lenyomott biztosíték: Radics Peti, Dragomán György és Geszti Péter is reagált az M1 elsötétítésére
HVG.summary: Sorra üdvözlik az ismert emberek, hogy az M1-en felfüggesztették a hírszolgáltatást. Van, aki azért még nem bont pezsgőt.

HVG.title: Megvan a nagy terv, 10 millió robot kezdhet el dolgozni Japánban
HVG.summary: Japán régóta küzd azzal, hogy az elöregedő társadalom, valamint más tényezők miatt egyre nehezebb munkavállalókat találni bizonyos iparágakban. A politikai döntéshozók ezt a problémát most a robotizációval oldanák meg.

HVG.title: Kultúránk alapja: a pálinka és a töltött káposzta

HVG.title: Feljelentést tett a TASZ a tudtukon kívül nemzetiségi listára vett választópolgárok ügye miatt
HVG.summary: Sokan a választás napján szembesültek azzal, hogy tudtukon kívül nemzetiségi választói névjegyzékbe vették őket, így pártlista helyett nemzetiségi listára tudtak csak szavazni. A kampányidőszakban több mint 10 ezer embert vettek nemzetiségi névjegyzékbe „meghatalmazottja” útján.

HVG.title: Magyar Péter meglátogatta Mancs szobrát Izmitben
HVG.summary: A szobrot még Novák Katalin jelenlétében avatták fel 2023-ban.

HVG.summary: Hogy le tudjanak faragni a várólistából, az intézmény kap egy mobil MR-készüléket is, illetve egy új gépre is ígéretet kaptak.

HVG.title: Lemondott képviselői mandátumáról Nigel Farage, de az időközin újra elindul
HVG.summary: A Brexit-párti Reform UK párt vezetője egy 2024-es választás előtti, be nem vallott ajándékozási ügye miatt adta vissza mandátumát, hogy úja megszerezhesse azt.

BBC.title: Harry loses High Court privacy case against Daily Mail publisher
BBC.summary: Judge Mr Justice Nicklin says the claimants had failed to prove the allegations.

BBC.title: Marine Le Pen found guilty, but court clears way for presidential run if she wears tag
BBC.summary: The National Rally leader now has to decide whether she will run with an electronic tag and will speak on TV later.

BBC.title: Woman suspected of Monaco bomb attack found dead in Ukraine
BBC.summary: Police had been hunting Anastasiia Berezovska after a Ukrainian millionaire was injured in the blast.

BBC.title: One million more UK homeowners set  to face higher mortgages
BBC.summary: Homeowners face paying £45 a month more on average when they move onto a new deal over the next two years.

BBC.title: What do Farage's constituents think about his resignation?
BBC.summary: People living in Clacton share contrasting feelings of frustration and support towards Nigel Farage.

BBC.title: Online gamblers betting more than £1,000 to face new checks
BBC.summary: Punters who bet more than £1,000 online in a 24-hour window will have to undergo an assessment, the regulator says.

BBC.title: Murder inquiry after mother and children found dead
BBC.summary: A mother and her two children are found dead in a property, police say.

BBC.title: Lawyer says detained Gaza doctor was severely beaten in Israeli jail
BBC.summary: The lawyer for Dr Hussam Abu Safiya tells the BBC his client was so badly beaten he could not recognise him during a visit last week.

BBC.title: Public to be asked who should pay for social care as part of major review
BBC.summary: Baroness Louise Casey, who is leading the review, has called the current system "impossible".

BBC.title: Salah v Messi: A World Cup meeting of two national icons
BBC.summary: Mohamed Salah and Lionel Messi will meet in the last 16 of the World Cup on Tuesday with their nations' hopes resting firmly on their shoulders.

BBC.title: Kane and Bellingham: How superstar double act became England's Wonderwall
BBC.summary: With 10 of England's 11 goals at the World Cup scored by either Harry Kane or Jude Bellingham, BBC Sport looks at how dependent on them the team is.

BBC.title: Jude Bellingham station to keep name until Monday
BBC.summary: The station was renamed to give England a boost before the match with Mexico - in which Jude Bellingham shone.

BBC.title: Alan Carr is keeping one unwanted item from his castle auction – see what was sold
BBC.summary: A concrete cow was the only one of the hundreds of items from Ayton Castle that failed to find a buyer.

BBC.title: Why there's a market for rental robots at work and at home
BBC.summary: Robotics tech is changing fast, so for many it makes sense to rent a robot.

BBC.title: The man who invented a sport and played tennis with Willy Wonka
BBC.summary: Brad Parks came up with the idea for a new sport while on a family picnic 50 years ago.

TechCrunch.title: Claude Cowork expands to mobile and web
TechCrunch.summary: Anthropic’s Claude Cowork is now available on web and mobile for Max subscribers. Until now, Cowork largely lived on a user’s laptop. With the update, users can start a task from their desk, get status updates on their phone, and pick up the finished output later — even if their laptop is closed.

TechCrunch.title: X adds a video editor to encourage creators to post original content, not stolen reposts
TechCrunch.summary: X is rolling out a new video editor and recorder for iOS with multilingual captions, green-screen effects, and other editing tools.

TechCrunch.title: Chemistry Ventures is raising $500M for its second fund
TechCrunch.summary: Chemistry Ventures, the VC firm launched by Bessemer, Index Ventures, and Andreessen Horowitz alums, is raising $500M for its second fund.

TechCrunch.title: AI law startup Norm raises $120M, hits unicorn valuation
TechCrunch.summary: AI law startup Norm has raised a $120 million Series C round led by Khosla Ventures, valuing the startup at $1.2 billion.

TechCrunch.title: This startup pits dealerships against each other to bid on your used car
TechCrunch.summary: Bidbus, which lets dealerships bid on used cars, has raised $15 million in a Series A round that was led by early-stage mobility fund Ibex Investors.

TechCrunch.title: Hacktivists call out Trump by hacking and defacing US Army websites
TechCrunch.summary: The U.S. Army has fixed two of its websites that were hacked to display messages calling President Trump a "pedophile" and a "thief."

TechCrunch.title: Savi’s app aims to protect consumers from realistic AI scams like kidnappers demanding ransom
TechCrunch.summary: The company just raised $7 million in seed funding, and is launching its app for iPhone and Android on Tuesday.

TechCrunch.title: The first American autonomous ground vehicles are fighting in Ukraine
TechCrunch.summary: Forterra has deployed more than 100 of its self-driving ATVs in conflict zones in Ukraine.

TechCrunch.title: Netflix invented binge-watching. Now it may have outgrown it.
TechCrunch.summary: A new report suggests Netflix viewers aren’t sticking around for Season 2. The bigger issue may be that binge-watching itself is no longer the advantage it once was.

TechCrunch.title: The ‘first’ AI-run ransomware attack still needed a human
TechCrunch.summary: An AI agent carried out the technical execution of a real-world ransomware attack for the first known time, but new details show a human still chose the victim, set up the infrastructure, and supplied stolen credentials — meaning it wasn't quite the fully autonomous cybercrime debut that last week's headlines suggested.

TechCrunch.title: US investors will soon get access to SK Hynix, another memory maker riding the AI boom
TechCrunch.summary: SK Hynix is experiencing a boom credited to AI. It will ride that to a multibillion-dollar U.S. IPO, expected to take place on Friday.

TechCrunch.title: Vercel CEO Guillermo Rauch on the fight to split off models from agents
TechCrunch.summary: "The reality is, when you're optimizing for production, you start looking at a price/performance," Guillermo Rauch tells TechCrunch.

TechCrunch.title: You can now customize Siri’s pace and expressivity in the latest iOS 27 beta
TechCrunch.summary: The update is part of Apple's broader effort to make Siri feel more natural and personal, as it rebuilds the assistant around generative AI.

TechCrunch.title: Every major tech layoff in 2026 that has name-checked AI
TechCrunch.summary: A running look — in reverse chronological order — at the bigger tech companies that have announced significant layoffs this year with AI as a stated factor.

TechCrunch.title: Amazon competitor Bookshop.org says Kobo eReader support will happen this year after all
TechCrunch.summary: Bookship.org seemed to delay this anticipated partnership again, but tells TechCrunch that it has settled business terms  and is working on integration.
